about.story_p1: Ülker was founded in İstanbul in 1944 by Sabri Ülker with a simple belief: that good food brings people together. Starting with a single biscuit, we have grown into one of Turkey's most beloved and internationally recognised food companies.
about.story_p2: Today, as part of the pladis family, Ülker products are enjoyed in over 80 countries. Our portfolio spans biscuits, chocolate, wafers, cakes, crackers, and snacks — all made with the same dedication to quality that has defined us for eight decades.
about.founded_desc: Sabri Ülker establishes Ülker in İstanbul with a single biscuit product.
about.national_expansion_desc: Rapid growth across Turkey as Petibör and Halley become household names.
about.first_exports_desc: Ülker products begin reaching international markets across the Middle East and Europe.
about.public_listing_desc: Ülker Bisküvi is listed on the Istanbul Stock Exchange.
about.global_acquisitions_desc: Strategic acquisition of international biscuit and chocolate brands across Europe and Asia.
about.pladis_family_desc: Ülker joins the pladis global biscuit and confectionery company alongside McVitie's and Godiva.
about.today_desc: Ülker products are enjoyed in over 80 countries, with a portfolio of 200+ products.

contact.contact_desc: Our team is available to answer product enquiries, trade questions, and media requests.
contact.faq_q1: How can I find nutritional information for a product?
contact.faq_a1: Detailed nutritional information is available on every product page in this catalog, including per-serving and per-100g values.
contact.faq_q2: Where can I find allergen information?
contact.faq_a2: Each product page includes a dedicated allergen section listing all declared allergens and potential cross-contamination risks.
contact.faq_q3: Are Ülker products available outside Turkey?
contact.faq_a3: Yes — Ülker products are distributed in over 80 countries. Contact our export team for regional distributor information.
contact.faq_q4: How do I report a quality concern?
contact.faq_a4: Please contact our consumer services team by phone or email with the product barcode and batch number. We respond within 24 hours.
